/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libkratos_vishvesh_q2_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/kratos_vishvesh_q2_msgs/libkratos_vishvesh_q2_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/kratos_vishvesh_q2_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/kratos_vishvesh_q2_msgs/msg/_rover_status_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/vishvesh/ros2_ws/build/kratos_vishvesh_q2_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libkratos_vishvesh_q2_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libkratos_vishvesh_q2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
